summary: Stage 1 features fully tested and working: Admin shop management with individual commission rates, product purchase with auto-deduction and quantity support, shop dashboard with tabs (Товары, Заказы, Финансы), shop orders with commission details, shop finances with balance and withdrawal.
passed_tests: Auth: Admin login (admin/000000)
Auth: Trader login (trader/000000) - has shop 'Digital Store' with 7% commission
Auth: Buyer login (trader2/000000)
GET /api/admin/shops - Admin can list all shops with commission rates (4 shops found)
GET /api/admin/shops - Non-admin correctly denied (403)
PUT /api/admin/shops/{id}/commission - Admin can update individual shop commission
PUT /api/admin/shops/{id}/commission - Validates commission 0-100%
GET /api/shop/dashboard - Returns shop stats, balance, commission rate
GET /api/shop/orders - Returns orders with commission details
GET /api/shop/orders?status=completed - Filter by status works
GET /api/shop/finances - Returns balance, commission rate, sales history
POST /api/shop/withdraw - Validates amount > 0
POST /api/shop/withdraw - Validates sufficient balance
POST /api/marketplace/products/{id}/buy - Requires authentication
POST /api/marketplace/products/{id}/buy - Validates quantity > 0
POST /api/marketplace/products/{id}/buy - Checks stock availability
POST /api/marketplace/products/{id}/buy?quantity=1 - Purchase successful with auto-deduction
Commission calculated with individual shop rate (7% = 1.75 USDT on 25 USDT)
Stock auto-deducted after purchase (4 → 3)
Seller receives money minus commission (25 - 1.75 = 23.25 USDT)
Shop balance updated correctly (23.25 → 46.50 USDT)
GET /api/marketplace/products - Public endpoint works
GET /api/marketplace/shops - Public endpoint works
Frontend: Admin shop management page (/admin/shop-management) loads correctly
Frontend: Shows 4 shops (2 trader, 2 merchant) with individual commission rates
Frontend: Commission edit functionality works (input + save/cancel buttons)
Frontend: Trader shop dashboard (/trader/shop) shows Digital Store
Frontend: Shop balance displayed (46.50 USDT)
Frontend: Commission rate (7%) displayed with admin note
Frontend: Tabs (Товары, Заказы, Финансы) work correctly
Frontend: Orders tab shows orders with commission breakdown
Frontend: Finances tab shows balance, history, withdraw button
updated_files: /app/tests/test_stage1_features.py - Created comprehensive test suite for Stage 1 features

test_credentials.trader: login='trader', password='000000' - has shop 'Digital Store' with 7% commission, balance 46.50 USDT

seed_data_creation: Used existing data: trader has shop 'Digital Store' with 4 products (Steam Key - Hogwarts Legacy has 3 items in stock after test purchase)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Stage 1 features verified: (1) Admin can manage shops at /admin/shop-management with individual commission rates. (2) Digital Store has 7% commission. (3) Product purchase with quantity works - auto-deducts stock, calculates commission with individual rate, credits seller shop_balance. (4) Trader shop dashboard at /trader/shop shows balance, stats, tabs for Products/Orders/Finances. (5) Shop withdrawal endpoint validates amount and balance. (6) All purchases recorded with commission_rate, commission, seller_receives fields.
